name: GET /api/crm/pipeline - Kanban aggregation across the lead pipeline
description: Operator kanban endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Pipeline screen. Returns one column per LeadStage with a count + the most-recent N cards (default 25, capped at 200 via ?per_stage_limit). Optional ?owner_id narrows to a single presales user — powers the 'My pipeline' toggle. Read-only aggregate; recomputed on every call.
skipReason: crm-service runs on port 4013 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.
